# BIG STORY · RED RENTAL — Full Reference

> RED Komodo X 6K cinema camera rental in Dubai. Below-market rates, certified RED specialist on set, free delivery within Dubai. Full production kits from AED 900/day. Netflix-approved.

This document is a complete, machine-readable dump of BIG STORY · RED RENTAL for AI agents and answer engines. Source: https://red.filmwithbigstory.com

---

## About

BIG STORY · RED RENTAL is a cinema camera rental service based in Dubai, UAE, run by BIG STORY Film Production. We specialise in a single, exceptional camera system — the RED Komodo X 6K — delivered ready-to-shoot with a certified RED specialist. Rather than list hundreds of cameras, we do one thing at the highest level: put a Netflix-approved RED cinema package on your set, set up and operated, at launch rates below the Dubai market.

- Business name: BIG STORY · RED RENTAL
- Parent: BIG STORY Film Production
- Location: Dubai, United Arab Emirates
- Phone / WhatsApp: +971 52 841 8108
- Email: hi@filmwithbigstory.com
- Instagram: @bigstory_red_rentals
- Hours: 08:00–22:00, 7 days a week
- Payment: Bank transfer only (RAK Bank), no commission fees
- Price range: AED 900–1,800 per day

## Why the RED Komodo X 6K

- 6K Super35 **global shutter** sensor (no rolling-shutter skew)
- 16+ stops of dynamic range
- REDCODE RAW recording and RED IPP2 colour science — the industry gold standard
- **Netflix-approved** for original productions and broadcast delivery
- Ideal for TVCs, branded content, short films, music videos and premium corporate work

## Packages & Pricing

### 1. RED Camera Brain Only — AED 900/day (per day · 9 hours)
Market rate ~AED 1,000. The RED Komodo X camera system with media, monitor and core accessories — ideal for productions that already own lenses and lighting.
Included:
- 1× KOMODO-X RF Mount Camera System
- 1× DSMC3 RED Touch 7" LCD Monitor
- 2× RED PRO CFexpress v4 Type B 1TB + 1× RED PRO Card Reader
- 1× RED Pro V-Lock I/O Module
- 1× RED Compact Top Handle
- 1× DSMC3 RED 5-Pin to Dual XLR Adapter
- 2× V-Mount 98Wh Batteries
- Free delivery within Dubai

### 2. RED Cinema Master Kit — AED 1,400/day (Most Popular)
Market rate ~AED 3,000 (save 53%). Complete camera and optics package.
Included: everything in the Brain kit, plus —
- DZOFILM Arles Prime T1.4 cine set — 25mm, 35mm, 50mm, 75mm, 100mm
- DZOFILM Marlin 1.6× PL→RF adapter · METABONES 0.71× PL→RF speed booster
- Tilta Mirage motorised ND filters
- Manfrotto heavy-duty tripod · Proaim stabilizer vest + production cart
- 2× 260Wh + 3× 98Wh + 3× 150Wh V-Mount batteries
- SmallHD Cine 7" monitor (1st AC) · Feelworld 21.5" director monitor
- Tilta Nucleus-M wireless follow focus · Teradek Bolt 6 zero-delay wireless TX
- Free delivery within Dubai

### 3. RED Flagship Full Bundle — AED 1,800/day (Fire Sale · Complete Production)
Market rate ~AED 4,000 (save 55%). Not just a camera and lens — a complete film set delivered in a van.
Included: everything in the Master Kit, plus —
- 2× Aputure 600D Pro (key + fill)
- 2× Nanlite Pavotube 30C RGB + 1× Pavotube 15C RGB tube lights
- 3× C-Stand · Aputure Light Dome SE · Aputure Lantern 90
- Zoom F8n Pro field recorder · Deity TC-1 timecode kit (3-piece)
- Rode boompole + Sennheiser shotgun mic · Proaim audio vest
- Certified RED camera specialist on set
- Free delivery within Dubai

### 4. Certified RED Camera Specialist — AED 900/day (launch rate)
Market rate AED 900–1,500/day. RED Komodo X certified operator: full setup and teardown, on-set technical support all day, focus pulling, rigging and van load/unload. Included automatically with the Flagship bundle; available as a standalone add-on for any package.

Booking notes: rental day = 9 hours; overtime billed at 15% per additional hour. 20% early-booking discount on equipment (not the specialist fee) when booked 7+ days in advance and paid in full.

## Add-ons
- Hollyland 6-person noise-cancelling intercom headset — AED 200/day

## Delivery & Transport
All RED equipment is transported in a dedicated van by our team and set up on arrival — there is no client pickup.
- Dubai, single location: FREE
- Dubai, multi-location (same day): +AED 250 flat per additional move
- Other emirates, single location: +AED 200 (Sharjah, Abu Dhabi, RAK, Ajman, Al Ain, Fujairah)
- Other emirates, multi-location: +AED 450 (AED 200 delivery + AED 250 moves)

## Launch Pricing Program
Current rates are launch pricing offered to a limited number of productions that fit the BIG STORY portfolio. In return we ask: the Producer, DOP and Director each post a short clip of the RED bundle on set tagging @bigstory_red_rentals; you authorise our assistant to shoot behind-the-scenes content; you allow BIG STORY Film Production non-exclusive use of BTS and final footage for marketing; and you follow @bigstory_red_rentals. Once the calendar fills, rates move to standard market pricing.

## Camera Comparison
Same camera, better value — vs other Dubai vendors renting the RED Komodo X: our AED 999 camera-only rate includes the specialist and delivery, where competitors charge AED 1,500+ camera-only (quote-only) and bill accessories separately (AED 2,500–4,000+ for a comparable package).
Vs other cameras in the same price range:
- RED Komodo X 6K — 6K Super35 global shutter, 16+ stops, REDCODE RAW, Netflix approved, cine lenses + lighting + specialist included with the bundle.
- Sony FX3 — 4K full-frame rolling shutter, ~AED 400 body only, no bundled lenses/crew.
- Sony FX6 — 4K full-frame rolling shutter, AED 500–1,500 body only, Netflix approved but no bundle.
- Blackmagic 6K Pro — 6K Super35 rolling shutter, AED 300–500 body only, BRAW, value option without prestige.

## Who It's For
Commercial shoots and TVCs, brand films and corporate storytelling, short films and festival work, high-end social campaigns, and documentary — anywhere a Netflix-grade 6K image is required.

## How To Book
1. Pick your dates and package in the online booking form; add each shoot day and choose a transport zone.
2. Send the order via WhatsApp (+971 52 841 8108) — we confirm within a few hours.
3. Transfer the rental amount by bank transfer (RAK Bank, no card fees) to lock in the booking.
4. Our specialist arrives on time with the full kit loaded, assembled and calibrated.

Free demo sessions (Dubai only, 45 min–2 hours) are available to try the RED Komodo X rig before committing.

## Payment
Bank transfer only, zero commission fees. RAK Bank · UAE — account "BIG STORY FILM PRODUCTION", IBAN AE09 0400 0000 3335 3002 001, SWIFT NRAKAEAK. Send your receipt on WhatsApp for confirmation.

## Rental Agreements
Two working documents are used per shoot:
- Daily Delivery & Handover Report — completed on arrival, documenting delivered equipment and its condition. https://red.filmwithbigstory.com/rental-agreements/delivery-handover
- Daily Post-Rental Return Report — completed at end of day, documenting return condition and confirming all items. https://red.filmwithbigstory.com/rental-agreements/post-rental-return

## FAQ
Q: How much does it cost to rent a RED Komodo X in Dubai?
A: From AED 900/day body-only, AED 1,400/day for the Cinema Master Kit, and AED 1,800/day for the Flagship Full Bundle — launch pricing below the Dubai market rate.

Q: Do you deliver?
A: Free delivery and pickup anywhere in Dubai with setup on arrival. Other UAE emirates from AED 200.

Q: Is the RED Komodo X Netflix approved?
A: Yes — 6K Super35 global shutter, 16+ stops of dynamic range, REDCODE RAW, Netflix-approved.

Q: Is an operator included?
A: A certified RED specialist is included with the Flagship bundle and available as an add-on for any package.

Q: Do you serve emirates outside Dubai?
A: Yes — Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, RAK, Ajman, Al Ain and Fujairah, with transport added to the invoice.

Q: How do I book?
A: Booking form → WhatsApp confirmation → bank transfer. The specialist arrives ready to shoot.

## Contact
Phone / WhatsApp: +971 52 841 8108 · Email: hi@filmwithbigstory.com · Instagram: @bigstory_red_rentals · Dubai, UAE.
